name: figure-editor-monorepo
description: Easy Plot draft workspace for SVG/HTML import, direct desktop-style editing, and round-trip export validation.
author: ARC - SJTU PhD Student

scripts.typecheck:import-pipeline: tsc --noEmit -p packages/core-parser/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/core-normalizer/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/importer-adapters/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/core-lifter/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/core-capability/tsconfig.json
scripts.build:import-pipeline: tsc -p packages/core-parser/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/core-normalizer/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/importer-adapters/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/core-lifter/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/core-capability/tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck:editor-pipeline: tsc --noEmit -p packages/core-history/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/editor-state/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/editor-tree/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/editor-properties/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/editor-import-report/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/editor-canvas/tsconfig.json
scripts.build:editor-pipeline: tsc -p packages/core-history/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/editor-state/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/editor-tree/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/editor-properties/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/editor-import-report/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/editor-canvas/tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck:roundtrip-pipeline: tsc --noEmit -p packages/core-export-svg/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/core-export-html/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/testing-metrics/tsconfig.json
scripts.build:roundtrip-pipeline: tsc -p packages/core-export-svg/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/core-export-html/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/testing-metrics/tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck:all: npm run typecheck:ir-schema && npm run typecheck:import-pipeline && npm run typecheck:editor-pipeline && npm run typecheck:roundtrip-pipeline && npm run typecheck:constraints-fixtures && npm run typecheck:desktop
scripts.build:all: npm run build:ir-schema && npm run build:import-pipeline && npm run build:editor-pipeline && npm run build:roundtrip-pipeline && npm run build:constraints-fixtures && npm run build:desktop
scripts.smoke:all: npm run smoke:ir-schema && npm run smoke:import-pipeline && npm run smoke:editor-pipeline && npm run smoke:constraints-fixtures && npm run smoke:roundtrip-pipeline && npm run smoke:fixture-authenticity && npm run smoke:desktop && npm run smoke:desktop-pilot && npm run smoke:desktop-shell && npm run smoke:desktop-gui && npm run smoke:release-assets && npm run smoke:store-distribution && npm run smoke:store-publish-ci && npm run smoke:performance-baseline && npm run smoke:real-sample-stability && npm run smoke:snapshot-closure
scripts.test:all: npm run test:prepare && npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:visual
